news.summary: Seattle - Vouched is currently working on integrating their platform into the Epic Toolbox under development, aiming to enhance remote identity verification for hospitals. This integration will enable hospitals to streamline patient onboarding processes, improve compliance measures, and enhance care delivery. The seamless AI-driven identity verification system within Epic will provide efficient solutions for healthcare facilities. Vouched is a trusted AI-powered identity verification platform utilized by top organizations in various sectors.
news.headline: Vouched is integrating into Epic Toolbox for remote identity verification in hospitals to streamline patient onboarding.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC, July 03, 2025- AlphaGen Intelligence Corp. (CSE: AIC | OTC: APETF | FSE: W4V) plans to resolve debts totaling $329,370 with various creditors, including director and CFO Eli Dusenbury, by issuing 2,251,330 common shares at $0.1463 per share. The shares will have a hold period of four months and one day as per securities laws. The completion of this debt settlement is contingent upon fulfilling standard conditions, such as obtaining all necessary regulatory approvals, including from the Canadian Securities Exchange, and is anticipated to be finalized by July 10, 2025.
news.headline: AlphaGen intends to settle debts of $329,370 by issuing 2,251,330 common shares at $0.1463/share to certain creditors.

news.summary: IG Design Group Americas, Inc. and its affiliated companies, known as DGA, a company specializing in branded and private label consumer products, recently filed for chapter 11 bankruptcy in the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas. This move aims to enable a court-guided marketing and sale procedure under section 363 of the Bankruptcy Code. By voluntarily opting for this approach, the company seeks to navigate its financial challenges effectively through this process.
news.headline: IG Design Group Americas has filed for Chapter 11 protection, aiming to maximize value through sale process.

news.summary: XRP Mining has launched a new app that simplifies crypto mining, allowing users worldwide to participate without technical complexity. The app offers fast setup, stable returns, and 24/7 cloud-based performance from smartphones. This eliminates traditional entry barriers, making digital asset mining accessible to all. The platform provides a simple way to mine cryptocurrencies without expensive equipment or complex software. By renting computing power through the cloud, users can start mining instantly through an intuitive app interface. The process involves quick registration at xrpmining.com, selection of a mining contract, and funding the account with various cryptocurrencies. Users receive an instant $15 bonus upon registration. This development is vital for the crypto community, as it democratizes mining and makes it more approachable for everyday users.
news.headline: XRP Mining's new app removes barriers to crypto mining with simple setup, stable returns, and 24/7 cloud-based performance. No technical expertise is required. Join now and receive a $15 bonus at xrpmining.com.

news.summary: Yesterday, investors turned to safer investment options, with a focus on small cap stocks. Despite losses in the technology sector, the Dow Jones index continued its winning streak. This shift in strategy towards defensive stocks indicates a cautious approach in the market.
news.headline: Dow Jones extended win streak despite big tech losses; investors turned to defensive names. Small caps in focus.

news.summary: A recent study conducted at UC Davis revealed that the financial scandal involving Wells Fargo in 2016 had a significant impact on consumer trust in traditional banks. According to the study, the scandal led to a decrease in trust among consumers, prompting many homebuyers to turn to fintech lenders instead. This shift in consumer behavior highlights the ongoing repercussions of the scandal, with a noticeable impact on the banking industry. The study sheds light on the evolving landscape of financial services, indicating a growing preference for fintech alternatives among consumers.
news.headline: Wells Fargo scandal led to diminished consumer trust in banks, driving borrowers to fintech lenders, UC Davis study finds.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Los Angeles, workers at EQ Environmental Services/Republic Services have voted decisively to authorize a strike in order to push for fair treatment and a strong initial contract. The recently organized workers, who are represented by Teamsters, voted overwhelmingly in favor of the strike action. The workers are demanding better conditions and terms as they negotiate for their first contract.
news.headline: Teamsters Local 396 votes overwhelmingly to authorize strike at Republic Services in Los Angeles for fair treatment, first contract.

news.summary: Butler National Corporation announced its financial results for the fiscal year ended April 30, 2025, with record earnings of $0.19 per share and a record operating income of $16.8 million, showing a 27% increase from the prior year. The company reported revenues of $83,968, operating income of $16,827, and net income of $12,551 for the year. Total assets amounted to $123,298, long-term liabilities stood at $33,770, and stockholders' equity was $65,114. There was a decrease in New Product Research and Development Cost from $3,069 to $1,693. The Weighted Average Shares - Diluted were 67,835,577, and Earnings Per Share increased from $0.18 to $0.19. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Butler National Corp reports fiscal year end 2025 financial results with record earnings of $0.19 per share and operating income of $16.8 million, a 27% increase from the prior year. Total assets at $123.3k and net income at $12.5k. President/CEO noted significant improvement. [Character count: 285]

news.summary: Dallas-based Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) revealed plans to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, July 17. The parent company of Texas Capital Bank will hold a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. EDT on the same day to delve into the operating figures for this quarter. This news was shared on July 3, 2025.
news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) to release Q2 2025 results on July 17, 2025, before market open. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. EDT.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy grew by 5.2% in the third quarter of this year amid ongoing recovery efforts from the pandemic. This growth exceeded expectations due to strong consumer spending and increases in both private and public investments. Furthermore, unemployment rates decreased to 4.3% globally, with major economies like the US and China showing significant improvements in job markets. In addition, inflation rates remained stable at 2.5%, providing further hope for economic stability. The report also highlighted a rise in global trade by 6.8% during the same quarter, indicating a rebound in international commerce. However, concerns about the uneven distribution of growth and the ongoing supply chain challenges have been raised, pointing to potential obstacles in sustaining this economic recovery momentum.
news.headline: South Star Battery Metals lowers warrant exercise price for $3 million private placement.

news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on July 3, 2025, the approval of H.R. 1, known as the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," is anticipated to bring about detrimental alterations to Medicaid. These changes could limit healthcare availability for pregnant women, infants, children, and low-income households. The bill aims to transfer expenses to states, raising obstacles for individuals seeking medical assistance.
news.headline: H.R. 1, "One Big Beautiful Bill Act," threatens Medicaid access for pregnant women & children by shifting costs.

news.summary: LGI Homes, Inc., based in The Woodlands, Texas, shared today that it successfully closed 457 homes in June of 2025. Additionally, the company reported closing a total of 1,323 homes in the second quarter of the same year. LGI Homes, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ with the ticker symbol LGIH.
news.headline: LGI Homes closed 457 homes in June 2025 and 1,323 homes in Q2 2025. Earnings call scheduled.

news.summary: Investors are preparing for potential excitement around the 4th of July as Bitcoin surges above $110,000 before the holiday. Despite some bearish sentiments in the market, traders are anticipating significant movements in the coming days.
news.headline: Bitcoin surges above $110,000, heading towards new all-time high. Traders anticipate 4th of July rally amidst lingering bearish sentiment.
